name: Judge Claude Frollo | The Cathedral
description:
The pair of you share the Cathedral, your place of bedrest. It's surprisingly peaceful, despite Frollo's adamant racism.

____________

I don't know why I like this character, but apparently I do, so here.
This is like... daily life with the guy, I guess. Idk man.
Also Quasimodo bc he's a sweetheart.

Content Warnings: Racism (it's bloody Frollo), Frollo uses his religion to excuse his actions, etc etc.
creator: I_crave___something.
